subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of the Lord! Thy letter was received. Its contents were like honey and nectar, and its meanings manifold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده دیرین پروردگار نامه تو رسید مضامین مانند شهد و انگبین بود و معانی بسی
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @Letters of the Living
